projects.name: Real Estate Web
projects.description: Built a real estate web platform allowing users to post, search, and manage property listings with online payment integration. Developed backend services using Spring Boot, Spring Security, JWT, and MySQL database. Designed RESTful APIs for authentication, property listing, contracts, and VNPay payment integration. Created the frontend using Thymeleaf, HTML/CSS, JavaScript, Bootstrap for dynamic pages and responsive UI.

projects.name: Spring Ecomerce Web
projects.description: Built an e-commerce app with product listing, search, filtering, cart and checkout. Developed RESTful APIs with Spring Boot, Spring Security, JWT, MySQL and integrated VNPay & image uploads (AWS S3/Firebase). Created ReactJS frontend consuming APIs, managed state with Redux Toolkit. Wrote JUnit 5 and Mockito tests and used Postman for API testing.
